customer_anxiety_profile: No anxiety signals on this call. Crystal was cooperative throughout and closed with stated intent ('We definitely wanna get in solar'). She is a warm lead, not a skeptical one.
unresolved_concerns: Bill amount is unverified — Crystal's electricity-only figure is unknown; Bucky entered a $200 placeholder. Closer should collect the actual bill or usage data before or at the start of the appointment.
Bill screenshot was routed to Bucky's personal number and receipt was never confirmed on the call. Closer should confirm whether the bill came through before the appointment.
exact_promises_rep_made: Panels and installation have no upfront cost — 'you wouldn't have to pay for installation or the panels. It would just be the monthly bill.'
If Ion cannot remove the current bill and save Crystal money in the first year, they are not allowed to offer anything at all.
closer_should_know: Crystal's husband is on the title and was not included in the booking. The closer must confirm at the start of the call whether the husband is present — if he is not, the appointment is structurally at risk of a 'need to talk to my husband' stall at the close. Proactively invite him onto the call before the proposal begins.
